prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约1470→1482→1171→990→1362，近5年呈先升后降再回升的波动走势；2025年基准约1362名，较2024年明显后移约372名；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021年62人、2022年61人、2023年52人、2024年53人、2025年53人；2026年计划大幅增至79人（扩招约49%），显著增加录取机会，对位次有较大后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第12名（校本部），稳居全国顶尖工科院校前列；2026年高考周期声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第10（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；校本部第五轮学科评估17个A-及以上学科，其中机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程、力学为A+，计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、土木工程等为A，工科实力顶尖；深圳校区共享校本部学科资源，计算机、电子信息、自动化等招生专业对应学科均为A/A+级别。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度均为高热推荐，与该校优势工科高度契合，吸引高分考生报考；福建省2026年物理类考生约20.4万人（估算），较2025年增长约6.1%，竞争加剧；该校位于深圳市，地处粤港澳大湾区核心，地域吸引力强，对福建省考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1362名、2026年大幅扩招约49%（位次后移压力大）、福建省物理类考生增长约6.1%（竞争略加剧）、学校声誉中性偏稳且抖音高热（关注度上升）、优势工科专业热度高（吸引高分考生）等多重因素，扩招效应占主导，预计2026年最低位次较2025年明显后移；预测最低位次约1733名，区间1515–1951名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1470 → 1482 → 1171 → 990 → 1362, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again over the past 5 years; the baseline in 2025 is about 1362, a significant backward shift of about 372 places compared to 2024; the enrollment plan for this university in Fujian Province for Physics Category was 62 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 53 in 2024, and 53 in 2025; in 2026, the plan sharply increases to 79 (an expansion of about 49%), significantly increasing admission opportunities and exerting considerable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 12th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (main campus), firmly among the top engineering universities nationwide; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin school popularity total ranking 10th (high heat), with large exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high attention from applicants; the main campus has 17 A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, including Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, and Mechanics as A+, Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc. as A, with top-tier engineering strength; the Shenzhen campus shares the discipline resources of the main campus, with enrollment majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation corresponding to A/A+ level disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended with high social heat, closely matching the university's advantageous engineering fields, attracting high-scoring applicants; the number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province in 2026 is approximately 204,000 (estimated), an increase of about 6.1% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Shenzhen, at the core of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, with strong regional appeal, attracting Fujian candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1362, a significant enrollment expansion of about 49% in 2026 (strong downward pressure on rankings), an increase of about 6.1% in Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province (slightly intensified competition), a neutral to stable university reputation with high Douyin heat (increased attention), and high heat for advantageous engineering majors (attracting high-scoring applicants), the expansion effect dominates, and the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift significantly backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1733, with a range of 1515–1951.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (including Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category enrollment expands significantly to 79, with a predicted ranking range of 1515–1951. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 1500 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science/Artificial Intelligence), those with rankings between 1500–1800 mainly choose Tier 2 as their primary options (Energy Power/Mathematics), and candidates with rankings above 1800 can use Tier 3 as a safety choice. The university has top-tier engineering strength and is located in Shenzhen, offering high overall application value.
